title: Metrics Analyst Modal Styling, Labeling, and UX Polish
story: As a DataTools Pro user opening the Metrics Analyst, I want a clean, well-labeled interface with clear instructions and disabled states, so that I understand the feature's purpose and know exactly what actions to take.
description:
A comprehensive UX polish pass on the Metrics Analyst modal covering naming, labeling, instructional elements, and interactive states:

1. Rename the feature from 'Analyze your Dashboard' to **'Metrics Analyst'**
2. Add an info icon on the title bar with tooltip: 'Metric Analyst will take your self service dashboards and build a metrics glossary for you automatically.'
3. Suppress 'No Data Available in Table' message when the table is empty
4. Update labels: top = 'Dashboards to Analyze', bottom = 'Select Dashboards'
5. Pluralize the button to 'Analyze Dashboards'
6. Disable the 'Analyze Dashboards' button (grayed out) when nothing is selected
7. Add 'Last Modified' date column to the dashboard list
8. Replace the close X with a labeled green 'Close' button in upper right
9. Add an 'Intro' button next to Close that opens a modal with an embedded YouTube tutorial video
10. Remove underlines from selected dashboard headings
11. Show a refresh button when no dashboards are available
acceptance_criteria: Feature title displays 'Metrics Analyst' instead of 'Analyze your Dashboard'
Info icon with tooltip description is visible on the title bar
'No Data Available in Table' message is suppressed
Top label reads 'Dashboards to Analyze' and bottom label reads 'Select Dashboards'
Button reads 'Analyze Dashboards' and is disabled/gray when no dashboard is selected
'Last Modified' date column is displayed for each dashboard
Close is a labeled green button in upper right
Intro button opens a modal with embedded YouTube video
Selected dashboard headings use standard H6 style without underlines
Refresh button appears when no dashboards are available
ux_changes: Complete visual overhaul of the Metrics Analyst modal: renamed feature, added info tooltip, updated labels, pluralized button, added disabled state, added Last Modified column, replaced X close with labeled button, added Intro video button, removed heading underlines, added refresh button for empty state.
middleware_changes: Added logic to pull and display the Last Modified date for dashboards. Added refresh capability to re-fetch dashboard list.
data_model_changes: Added analyzed time column to the dashboard model to track when each dashboard was last processed.
implementation_notes: The dashboard list pulls actual Salesforce dashboard records. A new column was added to the model to hold the analyzed timestamp. The refresh button is only shown when no dashboards are loaded, triggering a Salesforce sync.
comment_summary: Developer suggested adding a refresh icon for when no dashboards are available (similar to the offcanvas screen). Added an analyzed time column to the dashboard model. All items were implemented and pushed to staging.
